eventLog:
Hunt offers help.
COMMANDS
- look
- attack
- defend
- run
- search
- rest
- drink
- eat
- threaten
- repair
- rebuild bar

Helping also calms guards when they are on alert.
Hunt attempts: "help"

Hunt offers help.
COMMANDS
- look
- attack
- defend
- run
- search
- rest
- drink
- eat
- threaten
- repair
- rebuild bar

Helping also calms guards when they are on alert.
Hunt helps calm the situation. The guards lower their suspicion.
Hunt attempts: "help"
Hunt feels the pressure of the crackdown as guards watch every movement on the street.
[CHAIN EVENT — STREET] The guards tighten control of the street. People back away, and every sudden move draws attention.
Hunt hesitates while the guards take control of the scene.
Hunt travels to street.
[EVENT — VILLAGE] The villagers are already gossiping about the damage at the bar. Apparently no one agrees on who was most to blame.
Hunt travels to village.

Hunt offers help.
COMMANDS
- look
- attack
- defend
- run
- search
- rest
- drink
- eat
- threaten
- repair
- rebuild bar

Helping also calms guards when they are on alert.
Hunt attempts: "help"
[CHAIN EVENT — STREET] Boots pound outside. Town guards push toward the bar entrance, demanding to know who started the trouble.
Hunt backs off while the bar tears itself apart. The disturbance spills toward the street.
The bar takes 15 damage. HP: 60/100. Status: damaged.
[EVENT — BAR] The argument explodes. A stool flips, someone swings, and the whole room jolts into chaos.

Hunt starts a bar fight!
Takes 8 damage.
Chaos rises. Honor may fall if this becomes a habit.
Bartender Rowan has had enough of them.
The bar takes 25 damage. HP: 75/100. Status: standing.
Hunt attempts: "barfight"
Hunt waits and watches the world move around them.
Hunt attempts: "wait"
[CHAIN EVENT — STREET] The chase spills into the street. The thief darts between carts and townsfolk, trying to disappear.
Hunt lets the moment pass. The thief escapes into the street.
[EVENT — BAR] A quick-handed thief snatches a coin purse and bolts toward the door.
Hunt travels to bar.
The world begins. The village waits in silence.

activeEvent.name: Tavern Gossip
activeEvent.text: The villagers are already gossiping about the damage at the bar. Apparently no one agrees on who was most to blame.
